title: It's a Hard Life
writer: Luciano Bianciardi, Sergio Amidei, Luciano Vincenzoni
actors: Ugo Tognazzi, Giovanna Ralli, Rossana Martini
plot: Luciano Bianchi lives with his wife and son in the small town of Guastalla. As an intellectual and bibliophile, he works as head of cultural initiatives at a mining plant.
